channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Arnaque au téléphone : pourquoi il ne faut plus dire « allô » quand personne ne répond
item.description: Une nouvelle arnaque au téléphone fait des ravages. Elle commence par un appel silencieux, lors duquel un simple « allô » peut vous mettre en danger, ainsi que tous vos proches. Explications.

item.title: Dexter: Resurrection season 2 — new cast announcements and everything we know so far about the hit Paramount+ show's return
item.description: Dexter: Resurrection season 2 is officially in production. Here's everything we know so far from release date, trailer, predicted cast, plot rumors and more.

item.title: L’indétrônable Apple TV 4K en promo : le boîtier TV pour regarder films et séries en streaming baisse de prix seulement aujourd’hui
item.description: L'Apple TV 4K est un petit boîtier à brancher en HDMI sur un écran doté d'un port HDMI pour le transformer en TV connectée, à retrouver pour 149 euros au lieu de 169 euros sur Rakuten.

item.title: I have a serious iced coffee problem, so this summer I'm investing in one of these barista-approved coffee makers that'll brew me the perfect chilled caffeine hit at home
item.description: This is the year I level up my cool caffeine game (and lower my Starbucks bill).

item.title: How to stay calm on a hectic day
item.description: A packed schedule can sharpen your focus, but too much pressure sends performance crashing. You are bound to have one of those crazy days (or weeks or months) where your calendar is jammed with meetings, there are looming deadlines, and an emergency has cropped up that absolutely needs to be dealt with right away. Having a few things that hit at the same time can actually be good for you, but eventually, it is going to cause you problems....
